# mxroute_pointers (Data Source)

Lists the pointers (aliases and redirects) on a domain. For one pointer, use the `mxroute_pointer` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_pointers" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain whose pointers to list.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the domain name.
- `pointers` (Attributes List) The pointers on the domain. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--pointers))

<a id="nestedatt--pointers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `pointers`

Read-Only:

- `pointer` (String) The pointer name that resolves to the parent domain.
- `target` (String) The target the pointer resolves to.
- `type` (String) The pointer type — `alias` or `redirect`.
